title: sonerila zeylanica var. affinis
intro: Sonerila zeylanica var. affinis, also known as the Ceylon Sonerila or Ceylon Soneril, is a plant species within the Sonerila genus, which is native to Sri Lanka and parts of India. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Sonerila zeylanica var. affinis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat various skin conditions. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
